settings.heading: Own the
settings.subheading: Premium diffusers and masculine fragrances for men who understand that the right scent is the quietest power move in any room.

settings.range1_desc: Dark, sophisticated diffusers with scents that command attention. Oud, leather, cedarwood. For the man who curates his environment with the same precision he applies to everything else.
settings.range2_desc: Rocket ships, cannons, volcanoes, and armoured trains. Because adulting is entirely optional and your space should make you grin.
settings.range3_desc: Gallery-worthy diffusers and neutral, sophisticated scents. The fragrance both of you actually want in the house — the compromise that doesn't feel like one.
